Summit Hood Service Co.Service report link

buttons: HD-01 · Step 01Hood canopyCompletedDegreased and wiped accessible hood interior surfaces.
FL-01 · Step 02Filter bankCompletedRemoved, cleaned, checked, and returned to service.
PL-01 · Step 03Plenum / duct pathCompletedReachable path cleaned and documented in service scope.

DK-02 · Step 04Rear duct accessInaccessibleNot completed: Stored equipment blocked the rear duct access panel during service. This area remains tied to the recorded access item and should not be read as cleaned.
RF-01 · Step 05Rooftop fan areaRecordedVisible rooftop and containment conditions stay on record so the service team can answer follow-up questions.

rawResults.firstText: K Kitchen PERMIT 1 2 3 FREE BUILDER NO LOGIN Free builder: no login, no company logo/contact, 7-day test link, watermarked PDF, and no report history. FREE COMPANY LOCKED LOGIN PHOTOS & NOTES Create the restaurant-ready hood cleaning report. Add job photos if you have them. One short note is enough when the crew needs a clean report link and PDF for the restaurant. JOB PHOTOS Drop photos if you have them Before, after, fan, filter, access, label, and issue photos can all go in one batch. CHOOSE PHOTOS Photos optional Saved with report OPTIONAL NOTE WHAT WAS INCLUDED? Hood cleaning Hood, duct,
buttons: 1. Photos & notesOptionalAdd photos and notesDrop job photos or one short note. The builder drafts a customer-ready service report from there.
2. Review reportRequiredReview service summaryFix only wrong or uncertain parts in the preview.
3. OutputsLockedPreview link and PDFCheck the service report link and PDF copy before using the paid company version.
StandardHood cleaningHood, duct, fan, and grease path expected.
Hood + fanFull exhaust pathUse when fan and duct were part of the visit.
Filters onlyFilter serviceOnly hood/filter work is expected.
Fan onlyRooftop fanFan and rooftop grease path only.
Access revisitBlocked area returnOnly the access path is expected.
Condition onlyRecord conditionNo cleaning completion is assumed.
CompletedCompletedIncluded work completed; no customer action needed.Recommended
Blocked / no accessCompleted where reachableOne area needs access, revisit, or area clarification.
Condition foundService done, condition notedCondition should drive quote, revisit, or next-service follow-up.
Job basicsRequiredNeeded before output: customer, site, reviewerAdd real customer details before creating a link or PDF. The tool will not send untouched defaults.Add details

Today's resultCompleted: Hood canopy and filters, Reachable plenum, duct path, and access, Rooftop fan and roof discharge, Grease path and containment. No blocked, incomplete, or separate area is shown as completed. This is a written service record, so photos are not implied.Default lineEdit line
Report statusNo responsibility boundary can be shown until the visit outcome is selected.Shown as closedEdit line
Customer next stepSelect what happened today before the tool writes a customer next action.Default next stepEdit line
Photo / record basisWritten service recordWritten service recordEdit photos
Blocked / no accessCompleted where reachablePick if true
Condition foundService done, condition notedPick if true
Ready to review?Review reportReview the service summary, then fix only wrong or uncertain parts.
Save service report PDFPDF record from the same service record.

Today's resultAdjustCompleted: Hood canopy and filters, Reachable plenum, duct path, and access, Rooftop fan and roof discharge, Grease path and containment. No blocked, incomplete, or separate area is shown as completed. This is a written service record, so photos are not implied.Default line
Report statusAdjustNo responsibility boundary can be shown until the visit outcome is selected.Shown as closed
Customer next stepAdjustSelect what happened today before the tool writes a customer next action.Default next step
Service report linkPrimary outputWeb report - best for customer clarity, follow-up items, and reply.
PDF / printPDF copyFormal service report PDF - best for archive, attachment, print, and outside record requests.

HD/FL · Step 01Hood canopy and filtersCompleted from notesHood body, baffle filters, tracks, and nearby grease collection points were included in this visit. Completed from service notes; no field photo is attached for this area.

PL/DK · Step 02Plenum, duct path, and accessCompleted from notesReachable plenum, duct path, and access points were included instead of stopping at the visible hood face. Completed from service notes; no field photo is attached for this area.

RF-01 · Step 03Rooftop fanCompleted from notesRooftop fan, hinge/curb, belt/pulley visibility, and discharge-area status were included in the service record. Completed from service notes; no field photo is attached for this area.

GC-01 · Step 04Grease path and containmentCompleted from notesGrease path, grease cups, containment, drip points, buckets, or roof grease trail were included in the service record. Completed from service notes; no field photo is attached for this area.
